name: DNA to Protein Translation
description: Translate a DNA sequence to a protein sequence using the standard genetic code. Supports optional coordinate slicing and reading frame selection (1, 2, or 3).

inputs.name: seq
inputs.description: DNA sequence. Accepts a resource name (e.g. 'pBR322'), a raw sequence string, a FASTA-formatted string, or a GenBank-formatted string. The framework resolves these automatically before passing the clean sequence to this function.

inputs.name: start
inputs.description: 0-indexed start position within the sequence. If omitted, translation begins at the start of the sequence.

inputs.name: end
inputs.description: End position (exclusive). If omitted, translation continues to the end of the sequence.

inputs.name: frame
inputs.description: Reading frame: 1, 2, or 3. Frame 1 starts at the first base, frame 2 at the second, frame 3 at the third. Defaults to 1.

outputs.description: Protein sequence as single-letter amino acid codes. Stop codons are shown as '*'. Unrecognised codons are shown as 'X'.
